prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `bb52a14b`.
codex_response:
Rule: find the unique exemplar window defined by the `4` cells, zero those `4`s out to get a 1/8 signature, then add the exemplar’s `4` mask onto every other exact occurrence of that signature. The hint summaries were used as a starting hypothesis and kept; they matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` or new `dsl_ext` primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. I also loaded the built artifact files and checked the generated set stays in the right family: fixed `22x22` grids, one full 3x3 exemplar, one or two incomplete copies, and sparse `1/8` fragment noise.
